# assignableDocumentPageID

**Instance Property**

The [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignableDocument]  page ID that this work page ID corresponds to.

## Declaration

```swift
var assignableDocumentPageID: AssignableDocument.Page.ID { get }
```

## Inspecting the properties

- **AssignedWorkDocument.Page.ID**: A type representing the stable identity of this page.
- **id**: The stable identity of this page.
- **AssignedWorkDocument.Page.Document**: The document type this element is for.
